nasb.text: Has a nation changed gods When they were not gods? But My people have changed their glory For that which does not profit.

esv.text: Has a nation changed its gods, even though they are no gods? But my people have changed their glory for that which does not profit.

cnv.text: 有哪一國把自己的神換掉呢？ 其實那些並不是神。 我的子民竟把他們的榮耀， 換了無益的偶像。

ccb.text: 虽然列国的神明根本不是真神， 却没有一国更换自己的神明。 但我的子民却把自己荣耀的上帝换作了无用的假神。
